'''Bedran Veb''' was a [[Sentience/Legends|sentient]] who once told a story to his grandchildren [[Nara (Grandchild)|Nara]], [[Frim]], and [[Roop]], of the [[Pre-Republic era|times before]] the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]].
